understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions shift the selected piece in the chosen direction if not blocked by walls (#) or other objects; some moves failed due to blocks (e.g., UP at [15,21], RIGHT at [12,21]). Coordinates are pixel-based (3 pixels per cell), and multiple selectables exist at positions like [9,21], [12,21], [18,21], [30,21].
